title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.117 - Battle of St. Louis Memorial day designated for May 26
text:
9.117.  Battle of St. Louis Memorial day designated for May 26. — May twenty-sixth of each year shall be known as "Battle of St. Louis Memorial Day" in the state of Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities to commemorate the only battle of the American Revolution fought in what would become the state of Missouri.
(L. 2019 H.B. 266 merged with H.B. 565)
